title: Create logging events at the application boundary
scenario: Domain code should stay free of logging setup. Application boundaries can create events with meaningful fields.
instructions: Define RegisterAttemptEvent and implement register_attempt_event that records request_id, optional user_id, and success.

hints.body: Keep the existing LogEvent, Secret, RequestSpan, and error_event helpers in place.
Return a RegisterAttemptEvent with event_name set to register_user.attempt and the supplied request_id, user_id, and success values.
One complete solution for Create logging events at the application boundary is shown below.

completionExplanation: register_attempt_event now creates a typed operational event at the application boundary while preserving the earlier shared logging helpers.
